title: 10 Monsoon Haircare Tips for Nepali Women
excerpt: Protect your hair during Nepal's rainy season with these expert tips from our lead stylist Anita Gurung.
body:
Why Monsoon is Hard on Your Hair

The humidity, rain and temperature changes during Nepal's monsoon season (June–September) can cause frizz, scalp issues, and hair damage. Here are our top 10 tips to keep your hair healthy.

1. Use a Clarifying Shampoo Weekly

Monsoon air carries pollutants that settle on your scalp. A weekly clarifying wash removes buildup without stripping natural oils.

2. Deep Condition Every 2 Weeks

Humidity causes the hair cuticle to swell, leading to frizz. Deep conditioning seals the cuticle and locks in moisture.

Book a professional Hair Spa at Natural Beauty Clinic for best results — call 9843805588.
author: Anita Gurung
